title: Metrics from Board to Board
excerpt:
Happy 2026, 
I am rolling over my metrics and with the exact same metrics just using 2026 data. Created my new group. The data is feeding into half my metrics and not the other half. HELP!!

posts.author: becauseimcj (CJ Scharfenstein)
posts.cookedHtml:
Happy 2026,

I am rolling over my metrics and with the exact same metrics just using 2026 data. Created my new group. The data is feeding into half my metrics and not the other half. HELP!!

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @becauseimcj

This usually happens when widgets or formulas are still pointing to the old group.

Quick checks:

Open each widget and confirm the 2026 group is selected.
If you duplicated the dashboard, reselect sources inside every widget.
Verify formulas or rollups are not referencing old statuses or groups.
Remove and re-add the 2026 group to any broken widgets.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Monday Wizard

posts.author: becauseimcj (CJ Scharfenstein)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you. I got it to work!

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Awesome, glad you got it working!
Thanks for the update. @becauseimcj
